ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary colors of the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the coach */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the coach */,
  "working_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the coach has been working */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the coach's contract was terminated */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the coach */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Coach's specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_members" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., coach, player, trainer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the staff member */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the staff member */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member's contract was terminated */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the staff member */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the staff member */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Staff member's specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game schedule */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in attendance */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player with the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is contracted with */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract */,
  "signing_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the contract ends */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Any additional bonuses included in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaching_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experience */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach with the experience */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach worked with */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the coach started working with the team */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the coach stopped working with the team */,
  "position_held" TEXT /* Position held by the coach */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* JSON object containing notable achievements during the coaching period */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving the coaching position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_experience_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaching_experience_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team with the performance */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "standings" TEXT /* Standings of the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the performance metrics are for */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points scored against the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage for the season */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., game schedule, player contract) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the document file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
